phase_progress: Phase 9 executing: 4/10 changes DONE. C-005 (MCP write path) landed: handlers + extension install/uninstall write the DB store (source=runtime) via apply_mcp_mutation; kernel replace_mcp_servers syncs both config.mcp_servers + effective so existing read sites stay correct; legacy config.toml helpers gated to sqlite-only fallback. Provider-default + config_set writes deferred to C-005b (user chose MCP-only scope). Next C-003 (seed) -> C-006 (reload) -> C-007 (determinism) -> C-005b -> C-008 -> C-009 (C-009 hard-gated on C-008 prod verify).

next_action.description: Seed-once + content-hash/revision/provenance merge in librefang-api: write bootstrap config.mcp_servers into the store as source=bootstrap on first boot, before the overlay — M, depends on C-002
